settings.title: Settings
settings.accountDesc: Review your current session, plan details, and account controls.
settings.workspaceSettingsDesc: Organize account, preferences, and usage in one place.
settings.settingsSubtitle: Review account details, preferences, and product usage.
settings.usageBillingDesc: Track recent product activity and keep the billing layout ready for future backend usage data.
settings.personalizationDesc: Manage who you are and what Ethos remembers.
settings.languageDesc: Select your preferred language for the interface.
settings.clearLocalBrowserDataDesc: Remove cached threads, profile settings, and auth state from this browser only. Server-side files and thread permissions are not deleted.
settings.generalDesc: Choose how the settings experience looks and which language the interface uses.
settings.generalOverviewTitle: Shape the interface around how you like to work
settings.generalOverviewDesc: Language changes update the interface copy, while appearance controls the mood of every workspace surface.
settings.languageCoverage: Used across settings, chat, and system UI copy.
settings.themeAutoSummary: Following your device preference right now.
settings.themeManualSummary: Applied immediately across panels and controls.
settings.languageAppliesToDesc: Menus, settings labels, chat controls, and supporting interface text switch instantly.
settings.themePickerDesc: Pick a fixed appearance or let Ethos follow your device setting.
settings.appBehaviorDesc: Tune how the app opens, moves, and responds during day-to-day work.
settings.autoOpenWorkspaceOnDesc: Open the workspace automatically when tool output includes a live frame.
settings.autoOpenWorkspaceOffDesc: Keep workspace frames available in chat until you open them manually.
settings.sidebarExpandedDesc: Show the full navigation rail when the app opens.
settings.sidebarCollapsedDesc: Start with the compact icon rail to maximize chat space.
settings.motionStandardDesc: Use the full set of transitions, overlays, and workspace motion.
settings.motionReducedDesc: Minimize non-essential animation across the interface.
settings.sendShortcutEnterDesc: Press Shift + Enter when you want a new line.
settings.sendShortcutModEnterDesc: Press Enter for new lines and use Ctrl/Cmd + Enter to send.
settings.aboutWorkspaceDesc: A quick readout of the environment this app session is currently using.
settings.logoutDesc: Clear the local auth token and refresh into a new guest session.
settings.billingPlansTitle: Choose the plan that fits your pace
settings.billingPlansDesc: This section is a UI placeholder for future checkout flows, so users can already compare plans and understand the upgrade path.
settings.planStarterDesc: Standard monthly usage for solo builders.
settings.planProDesc: Customizable monthly usage for focused teams and power users.
settings.planScaleDesc: Extended usage for sustained productivity and larger workloads.
settings.teamPlansDesc: Flexible pricing for growing teams, procurement workflows, and shared usage controls.
settings.securityComplianceDesc: Enterprise-grade controls, approval workflows, and room for future certifications content.
settings.noUsageRecords: No usage records are available yet.
settings.moreAboutYouPlaceholder: Your background, preferences, or location to help Ethos understand you better
settings.customInstructionsPlaceholder: How would you like Ethos to respond? For example: focus on Python best practices, keep a professional tone, or always provide sources for important conclusions.
settings.knowledgeAddUnavailable: Knowledge editing is not available yet
settings.providerProfilesDesc: Each profile stores a complete LLM configuration. Your keys stay in this browser and are only sent to your configured Ethos backend at request time.
settings.defaultModelDesc: This model will be selected by default when starting new conversations.
settings.defaultModeDesc: Choose how the assistant should behave by default.
settings.securityDesc: Set your default permission profile for new chats. Temporary approvals during a chat still live on the thread until you save them as defaults.
settings.useServerDefaultDesc: Active. No personal override. New chats inherit the backend default mode.
settings.defaultPermDesc: Reads are generally allowed. Edits and risky shell actions ask first.
settings.acceptEditsDesc: Workspace edits are allowed, but shell still goes through safety checks.
settings.bypassPermissionsDesc: Most asks are auto-allowed unless explicitly denied or safety-blocked.
settings.dontAskDesc: Any action that would ask instead becomes a deny.
settings.defaultWorkingDirsDesc: One path per line. Relative paths are resolved from the chat workspace root.
settings.defaultRulesDesc: Format: subject | behavior | matcher. Matcher is optional. Subjects: read, edit, bash, powershell.
settings.reasoningSupportedDesc: This provider exposes dedicated reasoning controls.
settings.reasoningManualDesc: Ethos will apply common reasoning settings when possible and ignore unsupported ones safely.
settings.reasoningUnsupportedDesc: This provider does not advertise a standard reasoning API. Use advanced kwargs only if your endpoint supports them.
settings.enableReasoningDesc: If the selected model supports reasoning or thinking, Ethos will request it.
settings.advancedModelKwargsDesc: Optional JSON object merged into the provider request after Ethos applies the common reasoning settings.
settings.noProfilesDesc: No profiles yet. Add one to start chatting.
settings.selectProfileToEdit: Select a profile to edit its model, provider, and API settings.
settings.apiKeysDesc: Your keys stay in this browser and are only sent to your configured Ethos backend at request time.
settings.confirmClearLocalData: Clear local UI state and reload this browser session?

chat.thoughtLessThanSecond: Thought for less than a second
chat.deleteConversationDescription: This will permanently delete this conversation from the workspace, including its backend checkpoint data. This action cannot be undone.

composer.placeholder: Delegate a task or ask a question...
composer.helpText: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line
composer.helpTextShortcut: Enter for a new line, Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send
composer.contextSelectProject: Select a local project to inspect context.
composer.addProfileToChat: Add a profile in Settings to start chatting

nearCapacity.title: Context is nearly full
nearCapacity.detail: Consider starting a fresh thread or compacting before a large follow-up.

memoryHeavy.title: Memory files are using significant context
memoryHeavy.detail: Review AGENTS.md and project instructions for stale or duplicated guidance.

messagesHeavy.title: Conversation history is large
messagesHeavy.detail: Older tool results or long replies may dominate the context window.

toolsEstimated.title: Tool schema usage is estimated
toolsEstimated.detail: This includes filesystem, shell, web, MCP, skill, and task tool definitions.

descriptions.project: Move this thread to a project

reasoningDescriptions.high: Use deeper reasoning for harder tasks
reasoningDescriptions.xhigh: Use extra deep reasoning when available

extensions.description: Manage project skills and inspect MCP servers without changing the prompt contract. Ethos still loads full skill instructions only through the skill tool.
extensions.selectProjectFirstDesc: Project skills are installed into .ethos/skills, so Ethos needs an active local project folder before importing packages.
extensions.noPreview: No local preview available for this skill.
extensions.selectSkill: Select a skill to inspect it.
extensions.connectionsDesc: Connect first-party accounts for Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Sheets, and Slack. Native connections and MCP servers can coexist.
extensions.oauthOpened: OAuth flow opened in a new tab.
extensions.connectionAuthorizeFailed: Failed to start the connection flow.
extensions.toolsAccessDesc: When enabled, Ethos can load this connection's tools in chat. When disabled, the account stays connected but the agent cannot use its tools.
extensions.selectConnection: Select a connection to inspect it.
extensions.mcpDesc: Inspect configured MCP servers, resources, prompts, and model instructions.
extensions.selectMcpServer: Select an MCP server to inspect it.
extensions.overwriteExisting: Overwrite existing skill with the same name
extensions.useSkillDesc: Selecting a skill inserts a slash-style trigger. Ethos will still load full instructions through the skill tool.
extensions.editMcpJsonDesc: Paste Claude-style MCP JSON here. Ethos will validate it and save it to the project .mcp.json file.
extensions.mcpInstructionsPlaceholder: Usage hints injected into the system prompt...
extensions.confirmRemoveMcpServer: Remove this MCP server from settings?
extensions.mcpUrlRequired: URL is required for this transport.
extensions.mcpCommandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport.

connections.description: Connect Ethos to external apps first, then manage extensions separately. This screen is designed as the control center for your app ecosystem.
connections.heroTitle: Connect Ethos to the tools your team already uses.
connections.heroDescription: Start with mail, chat, files, calendars, and product systems. The UI is ready for a much wider connector catalog, while live providers can already be connected from here.
connections.connectedNowSummary: These apps are ready to be used by Ethos in future flows.
connections.connectedAppsDesc: Only apps already connected in this project appear here. Use Add connectors to connect a new app.
connections.addConnectorsCardDesc: Browse supported apps and connect new tools without leaving this settings page.
connections.emptyDesc: Click Add connectors to browse supported apps and prepare this area for future integrations.
connections.availableSoonDesc: A preview grid of apps Ethos is designed to support next.
connections.selectProjectFirstDesc: Connection state is scoped to the active project, so Ethos needs a project folder before managing app access.
connections.oauthOpened: OAuth flow opened in a new tab.
connections.authorizeFailed: Failed to start the connection flow.
connections.authCompleted: Connection completed. The app is now available in Ethos.
connections.comingSoonStatus: This connector is planned in the UI but not wired yet.
connections.selectConnection: Select a connection to inspect it.

detail.author: Author
detail.noDescription: This connected app is ready to use in Ethos.

modal.title: Connectors
modal.subtitle: Connect apps and services Ethos can work with across your workflow.
modal.customApiDesc: The UI shell is ready. We can plug custom API connection forms into this space next.
modal.customMcpDesc: The UI shell is ready. We can plug custom MCP onboarding into this space next.

gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.description: Draft replies, search your inbox, and summarize email threads.

googleDrive.name: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access docs and files across your workspace in one place.

googleCalendar.name: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.description: View schedules, manage events, and coordinate time-sensitive work.

googleSheets.name: Google Sheets
googleSheets.description: Read spreadsheet ranges and append structured rows.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Read channels, search discussions, and draft team replies.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Manage repositories, PRs, and engineering workflows.

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Search notes, update docs, and organize internal knowledge.

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Track issues, plan milestones, and keep product work in sync.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.description: Inspect projects, query data, and support product operations.

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.description: Watch deployments, projects, and environments from Ethos.

airtable.name: Airtable
airtable.description: Work with structured records, ops tables, and team data.

workspace.title: Ethos's Computer
workspace.subtitle: Live workspace for tools, files, and execution

browser.empty: No content returned from this URL

workspace.activityFallback: Waiting for the next workspace step

emptyState.title: What can I do for you?
emptyState.subtitle: Move from idea to execution in one workspace: plan slides, draft websites, scope desktop apps, and design polished product flows without switching contexts.
emptyState.createSlidesDesc: Create a polished slide deck for a product strategy review.
emptyState.buildWebsiteDesc: Build a responsive marketing website with clear sections and calls to action.
emptyState.developDesktopAppsDesc: Plan and scaffold a desktop app with the right architecture and packaging approach.
emptyState.designDesc: Design a clean, modern product experience for this workflow.

permissions.savedDefault: Saved as your default permission profile.
permissions.approvalApplied: Approval applied. Retrying the blocked action...
permissions.blockedByPermissions: This chat is blocked by permissions
permissions.approvalsTemporary: Approvals here are temporary for this thread. Use settings only if you want to change your defaults.
